prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic portrait of a young woman with pale matte skin, very long straight black hair, and dark-framed glasses shown from the waist up in side profile facing left, standing outdoors beneath a vast starry night sky. She wears a plain white fitted short-sleeve T-shirt and high-waisted dark pants. Her head is gently tilted upward as she gazes in awe toward an enormous glowing golden full moon directly behind and slightly left of her face, so large it fills most of the upper background. The moon should be hyper-detailed with visible craters, maria, surface texture, and a soft radiant halo, casting warm rim light along her hair, glasses, cheek, shoulder, and arm. Use a deep navy-black space background with countless small stars and a faint Milky Way-like cloud near the lower left. Compose vertically in a 3:4 portrait frame, with the woman occupying the right half and the moon dominating the left and upper center. Keep the lighting dramatic and realistic, with warm gold highlights against cool blue shadows, sharp focus on the woman and moon, subtle depth, natural skin texture, and no text, logos, or watermark.
